ddls:
CREATE TABLE "energy_assets" (
  "asset_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each energy asset */,
  "asset_type" TEXT /* Type of the energy asset (e.g., PRODUCTION, STORAGE) */,
  "asset_subtype" TEXT /* Subtype of the energy asset (e.g., WINDMILL, PHOTOVOLTAIC) */,
  "parent_site_id" TEXT /* Reference to the parent site or building where the asset is located */,
  "capacity_electric_kw" INTEGER /* Electrical capacity of the asset in kilowatts */,
  "capacity_heat_kw" INTEGER /* Thermal capacity of the asset in kilowatts */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the asset was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance performed on the asset */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the asset (e.g., operational, under maintenance) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or remarks about the asset */,
  "manufactured_by" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the asset */,
  "model_number" TEXT /* Model number of the asset */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the asset */,
  "warranty_expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the manufacturer's warranty expires */,
  "installation_cost" REAL /* Cost of installing the asset */,
  "operational_hours" INTEGER /* Total operational hours of the asset */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection */,
  "expected_lifespan_years" INTEGER /* Expected lifespan of the asset in years */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the asset */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the asset */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata about the asset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_assets_asset_type FOREIGN KEY ("asset_type") REFERENCES asset_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_assets_parent_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_assets_asset_subtype FOREIGN KEY ("asset_subtype") REFERENCES asset_subtypes ("subtype_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "site_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the site or building */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the site (e.g., city, state) */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person for the site */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the site */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the site */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the site */,
  "site_type" TEXT /* Type of the site (e.g., wind farm, solar farm) */,
  "site_area_sqm" INTEGER /* Area of the site in square meters */,
  "grid_connection_id" TEXT /* ID of the grid connection point for the site */,
  "operational_status" TEXT /* Current operational status of the site (e.g., operational, under maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "asset_types" (
  "type_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each asset type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the asset type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the asset type */,
  "expected_lifespan_years" INTEGER /* Expected lifespan of assets of this type in years */,
  "maintenance_frequency" TEXT /* Recommended frequency for maintenance (e.g., monthly, yearly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "asset_subtypes" (
  "subtype_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each asset subtype */,
  "subtype_name" TEXT /* Name of the asset subtype */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the asset subtype */,
  "expected_lifespan_years" INTEGER /* Expected lifespan of assets of this subtype in years */,
  "maintenance_frequency" TEXT /* Recommended frequency for maintenance (e.g., monthly, yearly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subtype_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "asset_id" TEXT /* ID of the energy asset that was maintained */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date the maintenance was performed */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., routine, emergency) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance activity */,
  "performed_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who performed the maintenance */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance activity */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled maintenance */,
  "inspection_required" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether an inspection is required after this maintenance */,
  "inspection_report" TEXT /* Text or JSON column for storing the inspection report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES energy_assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "asset_id" TEXT /* ID of the energy asset accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the asset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the asset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client (e.g., browser information) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES energy_assets ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
